summary: Iteration 5 - Comprehensive Post-Fix Testing. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing confirmed all pages load correctly. Demo data seeding fixed and working. All reported bugs from Phase 3 modularization have been verified as fixed.

minor.issue: Missing imports (app_config, bcrypt) in demo.py - FIXED during testing

critical_code_review_comments: demo.py was missing 'import bcrypt' and 'from core.config import validate_config' - fixed during testing

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all pages load, navigation works, dropdowns functional)

seed_data_creation: Demo data seeded via POST /api/demo/seed - creates demo agent, 2 buyers, 1 project, 2 units, 2 clients, 7 documents (quotes/invoices), activities, team members, and timeline steps
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase 3 modularization bugs have been fixed and verified. Demo data is seeded and working. Backend tests are in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration5_single_session.py. Use demo credentials to login as agent.

verified_fixes.missing_imports_fitz: VERIFIED - documents.py, doc_extraction.py, timelines.py, workflows.py all have fitz import
verified_fixes.missing_imports_stripe: VERIFIED - billing.py has stripe import, checkout session creation works
verified_fixes.missing_imports_reportlab: VERIFIED - documents.py has reportlab imports, PDF generation works
verified_fixes.duplicate_extract_document_from_pdf: VERIFIED - only imported version used, no duplicate function
verified_fixes.extract_document_type_unknown_400: VERIFIED - type=unknown now falls back to quote extraction (returns 200)
verified_fixes.stripe_checkout_mode: VERIFIED - checkout session created successfully with subscription mode
verified_fixes.units_dropdown_empty: VERIFIED - units dropdown shows options in Command Center
verified_fixes.image_upload_fails: VERIFIED - hero image upload works (tested via API)
verified_fixes.document_extraction_returns_nothing: VERIFIED - document classification and extraction return proper data

api_tests_passed: GET /api/ready - database ok, all features enabled
GET /api/projects/{id}/context - project context with units and clients
frontend_pages_verified: Login page - role selection and demo login working
Agent Dashboard (Command Center) - working context, units dropdown, file upload area
Quotes page - 4 quotes with proper statuses
Invoices page - 2 invoices with SENT/PAID statuses
Clients page - 2 clients with project/unit assignments
